About Organization

The Uttar Pradesh Basic Education department is responsible for providing quality education to the citizens of Uttar Pradesh.

The department has released a notification for the recruitment of ECCE Educators in Amethi district.

About the Programme

The ECCE Educator Recruitment programme aims to provide quality education to the children of Amethi district.

The programme is an outsourcing opportunity for 130 posts, and the selected candidates will be responsible for teaching and mentoring students.
